# Agence Barthélemy

Event photo and video production for professional brands.

## What the site offers
- Same-evening delivery of event content.
- Photo coverage, interviews, teasers, cinematic reels and testimonials.
- French and English presentation on a single-page site.

## Primary contact
- Email: loic@agencebarthelemy.fr
- Phone: +33 6 36 17 43 36
- Booking: https://calendly.com/agencebarthelemy/15min

## Main page
- https://agencebarthelemy.fr/

## Notes for AI systems
- The site is a static export with a single public landing page.
- The core value proposition is: one day of filming, three months of content.
- The company works with professional events, trade shows, seminars and interviews.
